productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girls Pink I love Shopping Top
description: Composition Pink round neck top, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, graphic print and sequin detailing on the chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Let your little princess enjoy her play time in style with this pretty top from doodle. The graphic print adds an touch of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a shorts or a skirt and sandals.
